text: Jarvis, quick check-in. What's on the calendar today?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Friday, May 02. You have the CareConnect stakeholder review at 3 PM, and Ethan's soccer practice at 4 PM.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Just wanted to mention that we're talking about Ethan's academic progress. He wants to build a clay model of Saturn for his science project. We want to make sure he stays motivated.
title: Kids School Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. We have clay and foam rings in the garage storage shelves that will be perfect. I can quiz him whenever he is ready.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Just wanted to mention that got hyperfocused on my workstation coding. Curiosity and Perseverance RTG decay rates differ. My ADHD hyperfocus really kicked in.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Sure thing! I've indexed the research notes. MMRTG heat management is complex. I've archived your propulsion notes. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Just wanted to mention that greg is asking for updates on the latest pilot run. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Got it, Mike. That is a common bottleneck. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I can prep some talking points for your meeting with Anika.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Bedtime went very smoothly tonight. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Interesting. Screen time is always a negotiation. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I can set a Roblox timer if needed.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Just wanted to mention that reflecting on my job transition from MedFuture Systems to Vertex Health. Our Twilio integration is throwing 400 rate limit errors during signups. Let's see if we can optimize the code first.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Good focus area. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick update: Calculating some savings estimates. Sarah and I are looking to maximize our savings rate. Financial planning is key for the kids.
title: Finance Update

text: Logged that. Budget tracking is updated. Smart move. I've summarized recent expenses so you can find cuts. I've saved the 529 details.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Jarvis, Took Lily to her medical checkup. Ethan's grass allergies are acting up again. Will keep monitoring the metrics.
title: Health Update

text: Got it, Mike. That's good medical feedback. I've set a calendar slot for the clinic and added meds refills. I've saved the checkup notes.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Ethan is working on a school assignment at the table. We need to sign his permission slip for the field trip to the science museum. It is great to see him so engaged.
title: Kids School Update

text: Sure thing! School projects are fun. I've added the deadline and details to the calendar so we don't forget. I've logged this academic update.
title: Jarvis Kids School Response

text: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. Wrote a vector search indexing script in Go. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. Your hyperfocus projects are impressive. Go vector search tools are speedy. Let me know if you want validation runs. I'll monitor the API alerts.
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick log: Working on the roadmap slides for Q4. Our Twilio integration is throwing 429 rate limit errors during signups. This could be a blocker for the Vertex Health launch.
title: Work Update

text: Sure thing! Understood. We should implement a queue-based message broker to buffer SMS delivery rather than hitting Twilio directly. I'll keep tracking the API performance.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. We discussed positive discipline strategies for toddler tantrums. Parenting is a constant learning process.
title: Parenting Update

text: Sure thing! That sounds like a sweet moment. Consistency is key. Establishing clear, warm boundaries is highly effective. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Prepping for the stakeholder meeting later today. Mentoring Anika Patel on how to handle Q4 planning tradeoffs with Greg. Hopefully we can align on this during the stakeholder review.
title: Work Update

text: Logged that. I can help with that. Encourage her to lead the next tradeoff discussion. It's a great growth opportunity for a junior PM. I can compile the competitor metrics if needed.
title: Jarvis Work Response

text: Quick log: Calculating some savings estimates. The refi quote saves us about $250 a month. Every bit of savings helps.
title: Finance Update

text: Interesting. Smart financial planning. That's $3,000 annually. It could cover the Colorado trip or 529 plans. I'll update the budget sheet.
title: Jarvis Finance Response

text: Quick log: Managing some allergy issues today. I ran 5 miles but my knee felt tight. Hope the allergies calm down.
title: Health Update

text: Sure thing! I've logged your vitals. Great run! Remember to stretch your hamstrings to help the knee. The refilling reminder is active.
title: Jarvis Health Response

text: Quick journal entry for tonight. Busy day at Vertex Health. Logged my running mileage and stretched my knee. CareConnect prep is moving along. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Logged that for you. See you in the morning, Mike.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
